summary: Frontend testing PASSED for 6-theme feature. All 6 themes (Default, Dark, Tomboy, Gold, Noir, Neon) work correctly. Theme picker shows color swatches, clicking themes applies CSS class to workspace-shell, toast notifications confirm theme changes, active indicator (dot + border) shows on selected card, theme persists after navigation and page reload via localStorage key 'field-quality-workspace-theme'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified the 6-theme feature. All themes (Default, Dark, Tomboy, Gold, Noir, Neon) are working correctly. Theme picker on Settings page has data-testid='settings-theme-option-{id}' for each theme. Clicking a theme: (1) applies CSS class 'theme-{id}' to .workspace-shell, (2) shows toast notification 'Theme switched to {name}', (3) stores theme in localStorage key 'field-quality-workspace-theme', (4) shows active indicator (dot + border) on selected card. Theme persists after navigation and page reload. All sidebar navigation items remain readable in all themes. OverviewPage dashboard renders correctly under all themes.

theme_picker_ui.6_theme_cards_present: PASS - Default, Dark, Tomboy, Gold, Noir, Neon all visible
theme_picker_ui.color_swatches: PASS - Each card shows 4-color swatch preview
theme_picker_ui.active_indicator: PASS - Selected theme shows dot indicator and border highlight

theme_persistence.after_page_reload: PASS - Theme persists after page reload
